content.problemStatement:
It's winter and taking a bath is a delicate matter. Chef has two buckets of water. The first bucket has v1v_1v1‚Äč volume of cold water at temperature t1t_1t1‚Äč. The second has v2v_2v2‚Äč volume of hot water at temperature t2t_2t2‚Äč. Chef wants to take a bath with at least v3v_3v3‚Äč volume of water which is at exactly t3t_3t3‚Äč temperature. To get the required amount of water, Chef can mix some water obtained from the first and second buckets.

Mixing vxv_xvx‚Äč volume of water at temperature txt_xtx‚Äč with vyv_yvy‚Äč volume of water at temperature tyt_yty‚Äč yields vx+vyv_x + v_yvx‚Äč+vy‚Äč volume of water at temperature calculated as

vxtx+vytyvx+vy\frac{v_x t_x + v_y t_y}{v_x + v_y}vx‚Äč+vy‚Äčvx‚Äčtx‚Äč+vy‚Äčty‚Äč‚Äč

Help Chef figure out if it is possible for him to take a bath with at least v3v_3v3‚Äč volume of water at temperature t3t_3t3‚Äč.

Assume that Chef has no other source of water and that no heat is lost by the water in the buckets with time, so Chef cannot simply wait for the water to cool.
content.inputFormat:
The first line contains nnn, the number of test cases. nnn cases follow.
Each testcase contains of a single line containing 6 integers v1,t1,v2,t2,v3,t3v_1, t_1, v_2, t_2, v_3, t_3v1‚Äč,t1‚Äč,v2‚Äč,t2‚Äč,v3‚Äč,t3‚Äč.
content.outputFormat: For each test case, print a single line containing "YES" if Chef can take a bath the way he wants and "NO" otherwise.

sampleTestCases.explanation:
Explanation:
Case 1: Mixing all the water in both buckets yields 10 volume of water at temperature 15, which is more than the required 8.
Case 2: It is not possible to get water at 30 temperature.
Case 3: Chef can take a bath using only the water in the second bucket.
